refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns true if there is no band with given band number. If no band number is specified, then band number 1 is assumed.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns true if there is no band with given band number. If no band number is specified, then band number 1 is assumed.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting:
SELECT rid, ST_HasNoBand(rast) As hb1, ST_HasNoBand(rast,2) as hb2, ST_HasNoBand(rast,4) as hb4, ST_NumBands(rast) As numbands FROM dummy_rast;
rid | hb1 | hb2 | hb4 | numbands -----+-----+-----+-----+---------- 1 | t | t | t | 0 2 | f | f | t | 3
